name: has_dematerialized_promoter_securities
description: Boolean flag: has dematerialized promoter securities.

name: has_firm_arrangements_of_finance
description: Boolean flag: has firm arrangements of finance.

name: has_fully_paid_or_forfeited_partly_paid_equity
description: Boolean flag: has fully paid or forfeited partly paid equity.

name: has_held_equity_shares_for_1_year
description: Boolean flag: has held equity shares for 1 year.

name: has_in_principle_approval
description: Boolean flag: has in principle approval.

name: lead_manager_appointment
description: Non-negative integer duration (months/years) for lead manager appointment.

name: lock_in_period
description: Non-negative integer duration (months/years) for lock in period.

name: lock_in_period_excess_contribution
description: Non-negative integer duration (months/years) for lock in period excess contribution.

name: lock_in_period_minimum_contribution
description: Non-negative integer duration (months/years) for lock in period minimum contribution.

name: promoter_contribution
description: Non-negative integer (e.g. percentage or ratio) for promoter contribution.

name: return_date
description: Non-negative integer field for return date.

name: securities_acquired_by_certain_entities_at_lower_price
description: Non-negative integer field for securities acquired by certain entities at lower price.

name: securities_acquired_non_cash_revaluation_capitalization
description: Series of non-negative integers over multiple years for securities acquired non cash revaluation capitalization.

name: securities_resulting_from_ineligible_bonus_issue
description: Text/identifier field for securities resulting from ineligible bonus issue.

name: upfront_exercise_price
description: Non-negative integer (e.g. percentage or ratio) for upfront exercise price.
